purpose: Recheck the no-mHC node suspicion and separate stale MORI HSACO from real native-MORI/source-scatter stability.

baseline_node_check.shape: 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 MBS8 GA2 FSDP8 EP8 attention-only activation checkpointing no-mHC
baseline_node_check.post_run_vram_state: ROCm SMI returned to approximately 0.30 GiB used per GPU
baseline_node_check.read: The node is healthy for the retained no-mHC control. The corrected mHC OOR is a model-path memory/lifetime issue, not a bad-node read.

mori_jit_cache_fix.change: Add src/ops/dispatch_combine to the content-hash inputs for ep_* JIT kernels.
mori_jit_cache_fix.reason: The native compact dispatch assert came from intranode.hpp, but the previous JIT cache key only hashed ep_intranode.hip plus include/mori. Header edits could therefore reuse stale ep_intranode.hsaco.

freshjit_runs.failure: TORCHTITAN_STANDARD_EP_HOT_SPLIT_WEIGHT_LAYOUT must be selected, owner_sharded, or needed; attempted owner_compact
freshjit_runs.read: Discarded as a launch-env mistake. owner_compact is valid for weight_order, not weight_layout.

freshjit_runs.shape: 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 MBS8 GA2 FSDP8 EP8 attention-only AC native MORI compact triton_flat source scatter
freshjit_runs.failure: After checkpoint save, step-2 loss backward OOM allocating 7.89 GiB with about 5.32-7.56 GiB free depending on rank.
freshjit_runs.read: Fresh MORI JIT removes the previous native compact dispatch staging-stride assert; checkpoint save perturbs memory, so this is not a throughput gate.

freshjit_runs.shape: 8xMI350 S4096 GBS128 MBS8 GA2 FSDP8 EP8 attention-only AC native MORI compact triton_flat source scatter
freshjit_runs.failure: HSA_STATUS_ERROR_OUT_OF_RESOURCES during the next backward with Available Free mem: 2 MB.
freshjit_runs.read: Not a stale-HSACO or checkpoint-only failure. The native-MORI/source-scatter branch still lacks MBS8 headroom and is not promoted.

decision.next_action: Use the header-aware MORI JIT cache for future native compact profiling, but focus next on native compact memory/output residency or lower-MBS/native profile before retrying MBS8 promotion.
